task: Produce a reproducible analysis and expert memo that quantifies operational consequences of gating reproducibility exceptions and ranks remediation actions by urgency and evidentiary strength using only the embedded packet. Deliver a spreadsheet (flow_gating_4.xlsx) with formulas and intermediate values and an expert memo (expert_memo.md) documenting methods, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
